overview: Brindavan Institute of Technology and Science (BITS), established in 2008, is a private engineering college located in Peddatekur, Kurnool district, Andhra Pradesh. The institution is dedicated to providing high-quality technical education and professional training to students in the Rayalaseema region.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur (JNTUA).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&DS, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + AP EAPCET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (Structural Engineering, Digital Systems & Computer Electronics)

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level counseling (APSCHE). 70% of seats are filled under the Convener Quota (Category A) based on entrance exam ranks, and 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12 - 18, 2026; AP PGECET 2026: May 2026; Counseling: June - July 2026.

campus.specialNote: The campus is situated on the NH-7 highway, providing excellent accessibility. It is known for its focus on rural student empowerment and maintaining a disciplined academic environment.

contact.address: NH-7, Peddatekur, Kurnool District, Andhra Pradesh - 518218
